evidence: "The best part of this somewhat forlorn movie was watching the surviving partner emerge through the various stages of grief."
"I found this movie a worthy rental of which kept my interest. There is lots of action and no boring parts..."
"The characters were multi-faceted as individuals, not just some actors emoting lines."
"The movie takes a sharp left turn to insanity."
"Worst part of movie was that it dragged too long"
"I did not see an over abundance of cussing usually featured with similar flicks with low budget restrictions on dialogue and writing."
"I liked Lagartha's storyline throughout season 5 and I was surprised to see the Seer's unhappy death."
"Daniel Radcliffe clearly carries this otherwise dull horror movie through his skillful acting."
"I have long admired the character development of Katniss Everdeen from the previous three movies."
"I revisited this series when it became available under Amazon Prime..."
"The haunting piano accompaniment... make this movie true horror."
"The enormous spaceship carrying the passengers to the Homestead II planet oh so many light years away was a feast for the eyes..."
"Love this timeless movie. Have watched it several times."
"I was kept wondering whether this was a true horror story or was I viewing an entire family's deep descent into further psychiatric madness and oblivion."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of horror, drama, and action films, often appreciating complex characters and high production quality. They have a strong preference for sensory experiences and emotional resonance in storytelling, while their pacing preferences are mixed, indicating a tolerance for both slow and fast narratives depending on execution.
